mnemonics: BLAST: Bootstrap (B), Likelihood (L), Acceptance (A), Sampling (S), Techniques (T) for Module 4
keyPoints: Sampling methods generate approximate distributions when exact inference is intractable
Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) creates dependent samples that converge to the target distribution
Importance sampling reweights samples from a proposal distribution to estimate expectations
commonMistakes: Using too few samples leading to high variance estimates
Choosing poor proposal distributions in importance sampling that mismatch the target
Ignoring burn-in period and correlation in MCMC samples
